TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-kathethel2_kalaeh a oemaw

S.FORM: kakhayza'an yao e hayza' koSa'en ka noka tatini' ka kapanabih koSa: ka kathethel kathethel kakhayza'an koSa'en kama 'ima ra:am tnon ka kaybae:en ra:am sihoe.
S.TRANSL: 以前我有聽說老人的故事說，雷女是以前很會織布，會製線。
I was told the story by the edlers. It said that long time before, Kathethel was the one who knew very well how to weave and embroider.

S.FORM: kakhayza'an nak'ino komoSa' makaksekela' ki SaiSiyat.
S.TRANSL: 以前如何和賽夏族相識。
How she met the SaiSiyat people.

S.FORM: kakhayza'an SaiSiyat oma' rengreng rima' 'alep ray 'oeS'oeSo'an.
S.TRANSL: 以前賽夏人常常去野外打獵。
Before, SaiSiyat people often went hunting in the fields.

S.FORM: ta hayza' 'aehae' 'oSa'an rima' 'alep.
S.TRANSL: 有一個地方，去打獵。
There was a place where they went hunting.

S.FORM: rima' lasia ray ba:la' 'al'alihan mas'inasal risaa'.
S.TRANSL: 他們去河流附近搭工寮。
They put up a temporary shelter near the river.

S.FORM: ra baba:aw ray sinsekel rima' ma 'alep 'isaa.
S.TRANSL: 他們剛剛去打獵沒多久。
When they started to go hunting,

S.FORM: lasia ma' isaa rima' ila 'alep lobih.
S.TRANSL: 他們去打獵回來。
They went back from hunting.

S.FORM: lobih hini kita'en ray hataS nasia sa'sa'ih ka koloban hiza 'aSkan ray katalekan lobihin ma' ana pazay ma' ma' 'aS'aSay ila saboeh talek ila saboeh.
S.TRANSL: 回來看到他們的工寮，每一個廚房裡的鍋子，回來飯都全部煮好了。
They returned and found each container in the kitchen was filled with cooked rice.

S.FORM: rima' lasia 'aSmi'ael ka hiza ka pazay talek makaktikot.
S.TRANSL: 他們正要吃飯的時候，大家心裡都怕怕的。
They were about to eat, but they felt uneasy.

S.FORM: koSa: 'ima pasan'a'aih hiza hilasia ka kama'alep.
S.TRANSL: 就說也許有人想要陷害我們。
They said maybe somebody wanted to set them up.

S.FORM: m'itol 'aehae' hahila.
S.TRANSL: 第二天，
On the next day,

S.FORM: lasia rima' naehaen 'alep.
S.TRANSL: 他們又去打獵。
They went hunting again.

S.FORM: lasia ma'az'azem komoSa: ma takahini ila Saro:o' ila So: 'aehae' ka mae'iyaeh rini ma kitkita o: hosa:il i: takosaili 'izi'i: pakita'.
S.TRANSL: 他們心裡想：「就這樣吧。輪流一個人監視，要躲好，不要被他發現。」
Let's do something like this: we take turns staying here to hide and observe. Don't let that person see us."

S.FORM: sa'oewaz lasia 'aehae' ka kamo'alay saro'on ri'za ray ataS ra si'oSa' ila Sa 'alep.
S.TRANSL: 真的一個年輕人躲在工寮後面，他們就去打獵。
A young man stayed behind, and the rest of them went to hunt.

S.FORM: isa mwa:i' potngor roehaenaen ila.
S.TRANSL: 到了晚上就來了。
It came the evening.

S.FORM: ray katikinSao'on sa'oewaz kita'en 'inay hao mwa:i' sipaykakamoeh ka kabinao' 'inaray wasal 'izo' ma.
S.TRANSL: 晚餐的時間真的從那裡看到有個小姐匆匆忙忙從海裡出來了。
When the time came to prepare supper, a lady suddenly appeared from the sea.

S.FORM: mwa:i' 'isaza noka kamo'alay kitkita' tanisia.
S.TRANSL: 被那個年輕人監視跟蹤。
She was being observed by the young man.

S.FORM: mwa:i' wohwohwoh ma talek ila ka pazay.
S.TRANSL: 嘩嘩嘩的洗米，煮起飯來了。
She washed the rice, and cooked it.

S.FORM: pazay yo nisia 'okik ra:ami ka 'am sempong.
S.TRANSL: 他不知道米要用什麼量。
She didn't know what to use for measuring the rice.

S.FORM: lasia saspong ka kano' noka kaeh'oe' ka pehez sa 'ol'ola'an 'atomal si'siya'an ka kaklekeh kin sobae:oeh.
S.TRANSL: 他們量米的器具是樹的果實殼，像指甲那麼小。
The fruit that they used to measure rice was as small as a fingernail.

S.FORM: hiza sispeng za hiza ka SaiSiyat koSa: na 'inimita' si'si' haysia o hini pazay o: kin 'akoy talek.
S.TRANSL: 量米的時候賽夏人說，我們的飯煮起來還是很多。
She cooked too much rice, but it didn't seem like rice had been taken.

S.FORM: ampowa' ma 'ima kano 'atomal soka' isahiza kita'en noka hiza ka 'ima mia'lawa' zi'saa pakitkita' bowa tatini' zi'sa ka kamo'alay.
S.TRANSL: 不知道為什麼，被老人們派去站崗監視的是一個年輕人。
It is not known for what reason ... who was sent by the old man to guard the house."

S.FORM: hiza kita'en sia sa'oewaz mwa:i' talek ila.
S.TRANSL: 就被年輕人看到她真的來煮飯了。
The young person has truly seen her come to cook.

S.FORM: koSa'en hini So'o ay kama mwa:i' talek ila hini.
S.TRANSL: 你總是來這裡煮飯。
It's you who always came to cook here.

S.FORM: za sia 'okay tiskolater o: pa'yaka:i'.
S.TRANSL: 她沒有回答也沒說什麼。
She neither answers nor says anything.

S.FORM: yo kita' ka isaa kamo'alay lasia.
S.TRANSL: 小姐也看著年輕人。
The girl saw the youth.

S.FORM: sasaze:ez lasia roSa'.
S.TRANSL: 他們兩個互相凝視。
Both of them stared at each other.

S.FORM: maehraehraeng o: kik paehraehraeng makaksikar.
S.TRANSL: 沒有說話，都覺得很害羞。
They did not speak anything and felt shy.

S.FORM: hiza in'alay ri'sa: mayna:a' ila ka ina 'alep.
S.TRANSL: 從那時候他們開始等打獵的人回來。
From then on, they waited for the hunters.

S.FORM: honahai' kita'en ina 'alep lobih ila.
S.TRANSL: 一下子打獵的人就回來了。
In a short while, the hunters returned.

S.FORM: hiza ma minsa'la' ka 'aehoe' potngor ri'sa.
S.TRANSL: 狗先回來。
The dog arrived first.

S.FORM: ina'alep ri'sa: mwa:i' ila isaa ray ataS hiza lasia roSa' kabinao' ki kamo'alay ma' isaa.
S.TRANSL: 打獵人回到工寮裡年輕人和小姑娘兩人也在那裡。
The hunters arrived where both of them were.

S.FORM: 'i'ini paehraehraeng.
S.TRANSL: 沒有說話。
Both of them have not spoken to each other.

S.FORM: sa mwa:i' ka 'aehoe' mwa:i' ray kamo'alay ri'sa.
S.TRANSL: 狗來到年輕人那邊。
The dog came toward the young man.

S.FORM: mwa:i' kilohay ri'sa ray mae'iyaeh 'al'alihan.
S.TRANSL: 搖著尾巴接近人那邊。
It went close to the young man, wagging its tail.

S.FORM: 'inalay risa noka hiza ka kamo'alay koSa: ma' hini ampowa' hiza ka 'aehoe' mwa:i' tomo'aewhaey hataki yakin.
S.TRANSL: 那時候那年輕人說：「這狗怎麼這麼愛跟我玩？」
That time, the young man remarked why the dog naughtily played with him.

S.FORM: za mwa:i' ila ka imahaebae:aen ri'sa iska hehemi'an noka hiza.
S.TRANSL: 很多人安靜的來了。
There came a crowd of people silently.

S.FORM: ka kamo'alay hiza 'aehoe' sebeten sa.
S.TRANSL: 年輕人拍了那狗一下。
The young man hit the dog.

S.FORM: 'tet sa.
S.TRANSL: 狗放屁了。
The dog farted.

S.FORM: in'alay ri'sa bazae' ka intot hiza ka kabinao isa baza' na'ora sawa' ila hiza ka kamo'alay ma' sawa' ila.
S.TRANSL: 聽到放屁聲，那女人笑了，年輕人也笑了。
Upon hearing the dog fart, the lady laughed. The young man also laughed.

S.FORM: hiza ka kabinao' koSa: yao ka kaSnay ralom 'izo' koSa'en ka kathethel.
S.TRANSL: 小姐就說，我是從水裡來的。名字叫做雷女。
The lady told him that she came from the sea. Her name was Kathethel.

S.FORM: isaa sa'oewaz lasia maehraehraeng ila ri'sa.
S.TRANSL: 他們在那裡講話。
They were talking to each other there.

S.FORM: mwa:i' lohaporon ila noka tatini' hiza ina 'alep lobih ila.
S.TRANSL: 他們在那裡，老人們回來了，打獵回來了。
They were there when the old folks arrived. The hunters returned home.

S.FORM: saen So'o hini kamamwa:i' talek 'iniya'om.
S.TRANSL: 就說：「就是你常常來煮飯給我們嗎？」
They said: "Is it you who come to cook for us?"

S.FORM: ma' sa yako.
S.TRANSL: 就是我。
Yes, it was me.

S.FORM: nimon sa kapowa'en sa a talek sa siboeloe.
S.TRANSL: 你們怎麼把煮好的東西丟掉。
Tell me why you threw away the food I cooked.

S.FORM: hini mina 'inmoyo sa nonak si'si' ma'an taleken.
S.TRANSL: 我煮的是你們自己的米。
The rice I cooked was your own.

S.FORM: isaa sa' noka tatini' kosa'en So'o anyami ka si'si' o: 'ampowa' 'oka' ka sispengen ka si'si' 'okik wawala'.
S.TRANSL: 老人就說，你用我們的米為什麼都沒有被量過，沒有減少？
The old men said, " If it's our own rice, then why is there no trace of any rice being measures?"

S.FORM: hiza sa pakita' ila ka saspeng.
S.TRANSL: 她就給大家看她的量杯。
She showed everybody the measuring cup.

S.FORM: nisia ka inoka kaeh'oe ka ka pehez.
S.TRANSL: 他用樹木的果實殼作量杯。
She took a tree fruit for measuring.

S.FORM: isa mari'in sispeng hiza 'ol'ola'an 'atomalan si'siya'an ka kakloekoeh ka pehez kin ol'ola'an o:.
S.TRANSL: 拿來量東西。那樹的果實殼很小，像指甲那樣非常小。
It was taken for measuring. The tree fruit was as small as a fingernail.

S.FORM: koSa: 'ampowa' kin 'akoy ka pazay mayhae'hae' ray koloban.
S.TRANSL: 問說，為什麼飯滿滿的一鍋子。
They said, "Why was so much rice cooked that the pot was filled to the brim?"

S.FORM: koSa: niya'om noka isaa nanaw saspeng ma nakhini'an.
S.TRANSL: 答說：「我們用量杯這樣量。」
She said, " We only used the measuring cup to measure like this."

S.FORM: sia koSa: ma' 'am kayzaeh siya o: yao 'am rima' naehaen ray taew'an a singozaw ka tatini'.
S.TRANSL: 她說，也很好，但是我還要回家去問老人家。
She said , "Yes, but I have to go home first to ask my old man."

S.FORM: So: tatini' siwa' yao ma' 'asmiwa' mari'in 'inimon.
S.TRANSL: 如果老人家答應了我也願意當你們媳婦。
I don't have any opposition if they agree.

S.FORM: isaa inalay risa sia rima' lobih ray taew'an manabih ka tatini'.
S.TRANSL: 那她就回家去跟父母講。
Therefore, she went home and told her parents.

S.FORM: koSa: hawka' yao sasbong ki SaiSiyat o: SaiSiyat.
S.TRANSL: 說我在那裡遇到賽夏人。
She said, "I met the SaiSiyats there."

S.FORM: koSa: minowa' yakin 'iya inmari' yakin o: kayzaeh.
S.TRANSL: 說他們喜歡我，想娶我做媳婦，可以嗎？
They liked me, and wanted me as a daughter-in-law. Can I?

S.FORM: isaa sa manabih ka tatini' isaa tatini' isaa koSa: So'o So'o moyo roSa' a'inowa' ma' isaa 'am 'iyankowa.
S.TRANSL: 問老人家，老人家說，如果你們兩個想要，有什麼不可以？
She asked the old man. He said if both of them had the intention, then why not.

S.FORM: inaray risa noka SaiSiyat isaa mwa:i' kala SaiSiyat a koSa: hao tatini' siwa'.
S.TRANSL: 她就來賽夏人的住處，說老人家答應了。
She came to the SaiSiyats and reported that her parents had no objection.

S.FORM: o: So: moyo koSa: 'am sa'oewaz 'am mari' yakin ma' isaa mwa:i ila.
S.TRANSL: 如果你們真的要娶我當媳婦，那就跟我來。
If you say you can take me as a daughter-in-law, then come.

S.FORM: ma ta sasbong ki tatini' ma'an hi yaba' kil 'oya' 'aehael.
S.TRANSL: 見我的父親、母親，和兄弟姊妹。
To meet my father, mother, and siblings.

S.FORM: hiza tapaehraehraeng.
S.TRANSL: 在那裡談。
We'll talk there.

S.FORM: hiza sa'owaz lasia maehraehraeng kayzaeh ila ka pahraehraengan.
S.TRANSL: 他們討論之後商量好了。
They discussed and reached an agreement.

S.FORM: rima' ila lasia koSa: ta'ila.
S.TRANSL: 他們去了，就說：「走吧！」
They went and said, 'Let's go.'

S.FORM: ila o ray taew'an kanman.
S.TRANSL: 我們去我家。
We will go to my house.

S.FORM: isaa lasia rima' ila.
S.TRANSL: 他們就去了。
Off they went.

S.FORM: rima' ri'saza o: potngor ray wasal sakita'en Sa koSa: 'am mayhini mina 'am ila hao ray ralom 'i'izo'.
S.TRANSL: 他們去到海邊，看了，她就說要進入到水裡面。
They reached the sea and she said: "We will go deep into the sea."

S.FORM: yami ma' tikot.
S.TRANSL: 我們很害怕。
We are afraid.

S.FORM: kayzaeh Sa So: moyo tikot 'ayna:a' rini langi.
S.TRANSL: 好吧，如果你們怕的話，在這邊等。
That's all right. If you are afraid, you can wait here.

S.FORM: hiya:o taSa tasa panabih ka tatini' ma'an.
S.TRANSL: 我去跟我父母說。
I go to talk with my elders for you.

S.FORM: isaza 'ayna:a' rini tapaehraehraeng ila.
S.TRANSL: 在那裡等著要商量。
They wait there for discussion.

S.FORM: hiza sa'oewaz sia rima' ila hao manabih ka tatini'.
S.TRANSL: 她就真的去跟父母說。
She went there to speak with her old man.

S.FORM: lasia sasbong ray ray wasal langi.
S.TRANSL: 他們在海邊見面。
They met each other by the seashore.

S.FORM: isaa so: nak isaa ma' kayzaeh.
S.TRANSL: 如果是那樣，也好。
If that is the case, then good.

S.FORM: So: lasia roSa' 'a'aynowa' o: 'am 'iyangkowa'.
S.TRANSL: 如果你們喜歡有什麼不可以。
If both of them like each other, then why not (let them marry)?

S.FORM: So: rima' pakayzaeh kaelaehaeng ka korkoring ma'an.
S.TRANSL: 如果去了要好好照顧我的孩子。
If you went, take good care of my child.

S.FORM: sia 'in'alay ri'sa lasia makaksekela' isi ma maehraehraeng sizaeh.
S.TRANSL: 那時候起，他們互相了解，也商量好了。
From then on, they spoke with each other, and they got to know about each other.

S.FORM: hiza hayza nasia 'araS ka kasi'aelen ma' isaa sibae:ay ila hilasia.
S.TRANSL: 那他們有拿食物給他們。
They brought food there which they gave to them.

S.FORM: haysia ila ka pinaehraehraengan.
S.TRANSL: 做好了決定。
They have made a decision on the matter.

S.FORM: koSa'en ka kathethel 'araSen ila ray taew'an isaa o rima' ila ray taew'an.
S.TRANSL: 雷女被帶回家。回去家裡。
Kathethel was taken home. They went home.

S.FORM: lasia nak'ino hiza kathethel ma (Hx) rima' ma matawaw.
S.TRANSL: 他們做什麼工作雷女也跟著作。
Kathethel worked as the SaiSiyats worked.

S.FORM: matawaw ila kia ka kil SaiSiyat saboeh.
S.TRANSL: 和賽夏人一起工作。
She worked with all the SaiSiyat people.

S.FORM: isahiza sia tortoroe' ila ka saysiyat koSa: moyo ra:am tnon a ma tnon ka.
S.TRANSL: 她教導賽夏人，說：「你們會織布嗎？」
She taught the SaiSiyats. She asked them if they knew how to weave.

S.FORM: hiza SaiSiyat ma' hayza' ka 'ima ra:am tnon ra:am tnon hasa' ma sihoe kano' koSa'en sihoe hoba:ang hara ka ka kaybae:en hiza.
S.TRANSL: 那時候賽夏人也有會織布，會製線什麼的，繪畫那種衣服的圖樣。
There were SaiSiyats who knew how to weave, to embroider, and to draw things like the totems on clothes."

S.FORM: a tnon noka kano' hiza ha rareme 'okik hinghae' isaa ra ro hoba:ang noka isaza tononon.
S.TRANSL: 織布的時候用什麼染料之類的，織出來的衣服顏色都不同。
Using the dyes when weaving makes different colors of the clothes.

S.FORM: mwa:i' ka hinoba:ang mina kin kayzaeh kita'en 'oyae' hiza komoSa: sh nak'isaa.
S.TRANSL: 像那樣的話，來設計一定很好看。
If like this, it must look very good for clothes design.

S.FORM: ma 'ita tatoeroe' lasia saboeh sia toertoeroe ila ka SaiSiyat saboeh.
S.TRANSL: 請她來教我們，教導我們全部的賽夏人。
We will ask her to teach the SaiSiyats."

S.FORM: hiza tabin haysani koSa'en hara ka sihoewan kaybae:en.
S.TRANSL: 直到現在像那樣的織布的方法，
Till now, the way of weaving,

S.FORM: hiza noka kathethel tinonon ma tortoroe'an lasia tortoroe' sizaeh.
S.TRANSL: 雷女教導織布，他們學完了。
Kathethel taught them weaving, and they finished the lessons.

S.FORM: ma ra:am ila hiza ka SaiSiyat.
S.TRANSL: 賽夏人知道織布的方法了。
The SaiSiyats were able to weave.

S.FORM: koSa: 'ampowa' sia hiza kin ra:am ka inak hiza'an ka tatnon.
S.TRANSL: 就說，為什麼她那麼會織布？
They asked, "Why is she very good at the ways of weaving?"

S.FORM: hiza lasia koSa'en kabalihan yo 'okik hinghae' ka 'az'azem hiza ka SaiSiyat kabalihan.
S.TRANSL: 那些賽夏學生們就懷有異心。
The students thought differently.

S.FORM: hiza komoSa: So: nak isaa soka' 'ita' tapapasihinghae' ila ka tnon.
S.TRANSL: 如果是這個原因的話，那我們來比賽吧。
If it's like that, let's compare.

S.FORM: nihiya' 'akoy ka tnon.
S.TRANSL: 看誰織的多。
to see who weaves the most.

S.FORM: hiza o: nihiya' kayzaeh ka tnon.
S.TRANSL: 誰織的好。
See who weaves the better.

S.FORM: hiza hiza ka SaiSiyat koSa: yao ra:am 'atomalan na' ini tnon.
S.TRANSL: 賽夏人說：「我很會織布。」
The SaiSiyat said, "I know weaving very much."

S.FORM: nisia kita' nisia ka ka'aSkanan ka hiza tnon ma' isahiza ka kano' noka kaeh'oe ka pehez.
S.TRANSL: 她看到雷女放織布的箱子是用什麼樹之類的果實殼作成的。
She saw the cabinet where Kathethel put her clothes. It was made by the fruit of a kind of tree.

S.FORM: roSa' kaplalazemen isaa askanen ri'haw 'i'izo' hiza sai noka SaiSiyat lika paskayzaeh ka koSa'en sazakepan.
S.TRANSL: 那賽夏人放衣服的箱子是用兩個樹木做的箱子合在一起。
The SaiSiyat person's cabinet was two cabinets joined together.

S.FORM: sobae:oeh 'atomal ka kaaSkanan ka kaybae:en.
S.TRANSL: 很大的衣櫃。
Very large cabinet.

S.FORM: komoSa: nisia titi'an hiza kin ol'ola'an o: yao papasingha' ki sia ma ma'an 'am 'akoy nanaw a minsalaz 'inisia.
S.TRANSL: 她的箱子很小，我和他比我一定贏過她。
If she uses such a small cabinet, I would have more clothes than her.

S.FORM: hiza sa'oewaz lasia maehraehraeng roSa' ka kabalihan roSa' pap'aynola isaa lasia.
S.TRANSL: 兩個學生就討論他們比賽的進行。
The two students discussed how to go about the competition.

S.FORM: koSa So: yao siobaz niSo' ma isaa ma yao ma' kayni' ila ma yao ma 'am nak'ino ka mita' paeraehraengan hiza koSa: kayzaeh So:.
S.TRANSL: 他們討論贏的人怎麼樣，輸的人怎麼樣，另外一個人說好。
They discussed what to do with the winner and what to do with the loser. The other person agreed."

S.FORM: hao noka komoSa: 'am nak'ino 'am ma'ay'inola.
S.TRANSL: 要怎樣比？
How shall we compete?

S.FORM: koSa: 'aSkan ka kapanrahiyan kita'.
S.TRANSL: 放在衣架上看。
Put some clothes hangers (and see who has more clothes)."

S.FORM: kakhayza'an noka saysiyat hayza' ka kaybae:en ma' ray kapanrahiyan isa sipanrahi koza' kin 'akoy hayza 'aehae' kapanrahiyan hayza lampez ka tnon hayza' sam'iyaeh ka tnon ma' hayza'.
S.TRANSL: 以前賽夏人有衣服就掛在衣架上，很多。一根衣架有十件，二十件衣服也有。
Before, SaiSiyat has clothes hangers where they hung many clothes. A clothe-hanger holds ten pieces of clothes or twenty pieces of clothes."

S.FORM: hiza lasia a'inola ila noka minsa'la' ka SaiSiyat hiza ka kabalihan hiza ka minkoringan hiza koSa: ay nisia o: ta 'insa'la' ta 'al'oehaz ka tnon.
S.TRANSL: 他們正式比賽了。賽夏女人說，讓她先開始，先把衣服拿出來。
They began the contest. The SaiSiyat said to let her go first. "Let me take out my woven clothes."

S.FORM: hiza nisia pa'al'oehaez ila Sa inaray sazakepan mari'in Sa sipanrahi sipanrahi ray kapanrahiyan.
S.TRANSL: 她從箱子裡拿出來掛在衣架上。
She took them to hang on the clothes hanger.

S.FORM: 'aehae' kapanrahiyan yo ma to:o' may'amet ila zi'saza hao nisia ma' 'ima koSa: ma'an hini 'aehae' kapanrahiyan ma' ak 'akoy 'atomalan ila.
S.TRANSL: 一個衣架又三件，掛的滿滿的。他說，我有一個衣架的衣服。也已經很多了。
The other person said, 'I have hung one hanger. There are too many clothes.'

S.FORM: kayzaeh ma'an komoSa: la'oz ila hini la'oz ila si'an hini kin 'akoy.
S.TRANSL: 很好，我的已經夠多了，非常的多。
Very good. My clothes are enough. Many clothes."

S.FORM: za' hiza ka kathethel ila ka kabinao hiza koSa: ma koSa: ay ma'an hini 'ititi'an iyo' ma isaa tak yao ila tapanrahi ila mari'in Sa inaray hiza ray pehez.
S.TRANSL: 然後換雷女了，她說，我這一點點衣服也從果實裡拿出來掛著。
It came to Kathethel's turn. She said, "Let me take out the so few clothes of mine and hang them on the clothe-hangers."

S.FORM: 'askan 'i'izo'.
S.TRANSL: 衣服放在裡面。
The clothes were placed inside.

S.FORM: pa'al'oehaz sipanrahi sipanrahi.
S.TRANSL: 拿出來掛。
She took them out and hung them there."

S.FORM: 'aehae' kapanrahiyan mayhae'hae' ila kinae'hae'an naehaen kapanrahiyan.
S.TRANSL: 滿滿一衣架，還一個一個衣架掛著。
A hanger was already filled with clothes. Still more clothes.

S.FORM: roSa' ila kapanrahiyan to:o' kapanrahiyan hini ma'.
S.TRANSL: 兩個衣架，三個衣架了。
Two clothes hangers, then three clothes hangers.

S.FORM: 'akoy nanaw pa'al'oehaz.
S.TRANSL: 還拿出更多來。
She took some more clothes.

S.FORM: hiza ka SaiSiyat koSa: kano' a'ola So'o 'ampowa' kin niSo' ila 'ol'ola'an 'atomalan ka'aSkanan o: 'ampowa' kin 'akoy ka ka kaybaeen 'aSkan.
S.TRANSL: 賽夏人說，奇怪，為什麼她的衣箱那麼小，放了那麼多衣服？
The SaiSiyat said, "With such a small cabinet, how come you got so many clothes?"

S.FORM: isaa lasia ma'oe'oe' ri'saza.
S.TRANSL: 他們吵起來了。
They had a quarrel.

S.FORM: ma koSa: so: nak isaa hi moyo sahoewis 'iyakin koSa 'aewhaey ma' isaa kayzaeh yao ma'.
S.TRANSL: 她就說，如果你們那麼討厭我的話，也好。
Then she said, "If you hate me like that, it's all right."

S.FORM: 'am lobih ila ila haw ray 'inkaehoelan.
S.TRANSL: 我要回去我家了。
I'll just go home to my family.

S.FORM: hiza nisia 'ima 'ima rwasek ray saysiyat isaa 'aehae' korkoring nasia ma paskayzaeh.
S.TRANSL: 她和賽夏人一起生活有一個小孩。
She lived with the SaiSiyats and had a child.

S.FORM: hiza komoSa: hini 'aehae' korkoring o: ataka'ino'on ila.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩怎麼辦？
What to do with the child?

S.FORM: hiza kathethel koSa: yao nanaw 'okik lobih rara'itin yao ti'lilihin noka kabalihan tina noka minatini' ka balih yao 'am nak'ino'.
S.TRANSL: 雷女說如果我沒有回去，會繼續被賽夏學生欺負。那我要怎麼辦？
Kathethel said that if she would stay and not go home, she would be bullied by the students. Then what should I do?

S.FORM: 'aewhaey ma'an ka kin'i'iyaeh mwa:i' rini a ka moyo.
S.TRANSL: 我到你們這裡,我的生活不快樂。
I have not lived happily here with you.

S.FORM: ya:o 'ita' tarasiwazay ila manabih ka kamamanra:an komoSa: rasiwazay ila isaa taparasiwazay mita' hini korkoring 'aehae' nanaw o: 'am nak'ino ila.
S.TRANSL: 分開吧。男人說：「分開吧。可是我們只有一個小孩，要怎麼辦呢？」
The husband said that they should separate. "We only had one child. What to do with the child?"

S.FORM: ma' 'ana 'aehae' ma' kayzaeh mita' ta hiwa' ta 'roSa'ani o:.
S.TRANSL: 只有一個也好，我們把小孩切成兩半。
One is good. We cut the child in two.

S.FORM: 'aehae' 'iniSo 'aehae' 'inima inay kabih 'iniman inay kabih 'iniSo.
S.TRANSL: 一個給你一個給我。
One for you and one for me.

S.FORM: lasia o: siroSa' ka korkoring tiroSa'en nasia.
S.TRANSL: 他們把小孩切成兩半。
They cut the child in two.

S.FORM: lalasia rasiwazay ila.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們就分手了。
Then they separated.

S.FORM: hiza noka kathethel ma' 'aehae' ka inay kabih nisia 'araSen ila o ray taew'an.
S.TRANSL: 雷女也分到一邊帶回去家裡。
Kathethel had one half of the child and carried it to her family.

S.FORM: isaso o: ma'an ka 'araSen o: So: inowan 'ita' 'ipilaz.
S.TRANSL: 如果我把他帶回去，我們多久以後再見面？
If I take the child home, how many days alter should we meet again?

S.FORM: ila sa'oewaz potngor ila nasia ka paraehraengan.
S.TRANSL: 到了他們約定的日子。
The day of their meeting arrived.

S.FORM: ma hiza 'aehae' hahila Sa ma koza kin hoenaehnge hiza ma 'okik sekla'i 'atomalan isaa lasia potngor ila ka paehraehraengan lasia.
S.TRANSL: 過了很久到了他們約定的日子。
The day of their meeting arrived.

S.FORM: maraS ka korkoring hiza ka kathethel komoSa: ta sasbong mita' riha'o.
S.TRANSL: 雷女帶了小孩子來，說我們在那裡見面。
Kathethel brought the child, and said, "Let's meet."

S.FORM: tapak kakita' isaa ka korkoring al 'araSen nisia ka korkoring ma' 'ima ra:am ila ra:am ila manra:an.
S.TRANSL: 她帶來的小孩子已經會走了。
Her child has grown up and learned how to walk.

S.FORM: ma nisia haysia ma 'i'iyaeh.
S.TRANSL: 她的小孩還活著。
Her child was still alive."

S.FORM: hiza noka saysiyat ka korkoring pa'apol nasia 'aSkanen nisia bo:ok ila masay hiza ma'.
S.TRANSL: 分給賽夏人的小孩已經爛了，死掉了。
The child of the SaiSiyat person was rotten. The child was dead.

S.FORM: 'oka' ila 'i 'okik ila 'i'iyaeh hiza lasia.
S.TRANSL: 沒有活著了。
It's not alive anymore.

S.FORM: sa'oewaz 'ahoewis 'atomal ka inaz'azem rima' sasbong kosa: niSo korkoring hayno' ila.
S.TRANSL: 見面時心裡很難過，她問說：「你的小孩去哪裡了？」
They met with a heavy heart. She asked him where his child was.

S.FORM: Sa ma'an ka korkoring o: 'am hayno'.
S.TRANSL: 我的小孩呢？
Where my child is?

S.FORM: 'am ma nom 'i'iya mita' tiroSa'en sroSa' ma' isaa masay ila bo:ok ila 'oka' ila.
S.TRANSL: 我們把他切成兩半，現在死了，爛了，沒有了。
We cut it in two, and it died, rotten, and gone.

S.FORM: kita' ma'an ka korkoring hini 'ampowa' kayzaeh 'okik bo:ok.
S.TRANSL: 看我的小孩為什麼好好的，沒有爛。
See my child is good. He's not rotten.

S.FORM: hiza korkoring ma' kayzaeh ila ka kin 'i'iyaeh 'ibabaw ila Sa s'oelan.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩活的很好，也長高了。
He's very much alive and has grown tall.

S.FORM: hiza SaiSiyat maybih naehaen koSa: 'ita' naw 'okay ti'lilihi hisia ma' hiza kayzaeh 'atomalan.
S.TRANSL: 賽夏人很後悔，說，如果我們當初沒有欺負她的話，現在也很好。
The SaiSiyat person expressed regret and said that that person was good, and they shouldn't have bullied her.

S.FORM: 'in'alay ri'sa ma' isaa sia koSa' 'oka' ila kapaybihan.
S.TRANSL: 她說沒必要後悔。
She said there was nothing to regret about.

S.FORM: koSa'en lobih naehaen sia ma' kayni' ila.
S.TRANSL: 就算求她她也不會回去了。
She won't come back even if we ask her to.

S.FORM: koSa ay yao ti'nililihan nao nimon.
S.TRANSL: 她說，我被你們欺負過。
She said, I have been bullied by you.

S.FORM: 'oka' yao kayni' ka lobih 'in'alay ri'sa' lasia rasiwazay.
S.TRANSL: 我不會回去。從此他們分開了。
I don't like to go back. From then on, they separated.

S.FORM: hiza tabin haysani ma' isaa 'oka' ila kakita' ki saysiyat.
S.TRANSL: 直到今日都沒有再見賽夏人。
From then on, she didn't meet with the SaiSiyat people again.

S.FORM: isaa papay 'isaa ma'an ka panabih.
S.TRANSL: 我的故事到此結束。
My story ends here.
